title: Public attitudes to trade tracker (PATT): wave 7
body: "This survey collects data on public attitudes towards trade and government trade policy.  It looks at:   how much people know about international trade how much support there is for trade agreements what people think the impacts of future trade agreements will be what people would like to prioritise in future trade deals   This data was collected between 2 May and 7 July 2023:   through online interviews using a representative sample of 2,872 individuals aged 16 and above in the UK  "
